name: Audio Recording & Playback (AVFoundation)
promptInjection:
CAPABILITY: Audio Recording & Playback (AVFoundation)

RECORDING SETUP:
1. Import AVFoundation.
2. Configure AVAudioSession BEFORE creating the recorder:
   let session = AVAudioSession.sharedInstance()
   try session.setCategory(.playAndRecord, mode: .default)
   try session.setActive(true)
3. Request microphone permission: session.requestRecordPermission { granted in ... }
4. Create a file URL in the documents directory with .m4a extension.
5. Define recording settings:
   let settings: [String: Any] = [
       AVFormatIDKey: Int(kAudioFormatMPEG4AAC),
       AVSampleRateKey: 44100,
       AVNumberOfChannelsKey: 1,
       AVEncoderAudioQualityKey: AVAudioQuality.high.rawValue
   ]
6. Create AVAudioRecorder(url: fileURL, settings: settings), set delegate, call record().

STOPPING & SAVING:
- Call recorder.stop() to finish. The file is automatically saved at the URL.
- Implement AVAudioRecorderDelegate audioRecorderDidFinishRecording(_:successfully:) for cleanup.
- Store metadata (filename, date, duration) in UserDefaults or a Codable store for the recordings list.

PLAYBACK:
1. Switch audio session category to .playback or .playAndRecord before playing.
2. Create AVAudioPlayer(contentsOf: fileURL).
3. Call player.prepareToPlay() then player.play().
4. Use player.duration for total length, player.currentTime for scrubber position.
5. Implement AVAudioPlayerDelegate audioPlayerDidFinishPlaying(_:successfully:) to reset UI.

FILE MANAGEMENT:
- Store recordings in FileManager.default.urls(for: .documentDirectory, in: .userDomainMask).first!
- Use unique filenames: "recording-\(Date().timeIntervalSince1970).m4a"
- To delete: FileManager.default.removeItem(at: fileURL)

CRITICAL GOTCHAS:
- MUST set audio session category BEFORE creating AVAudioRecorder — otherwise it silently fails.
- MUST request microphone permission — app crashes without NSMicrophoneUsageDescription.
- When switching from recording to playback, you may need to reconfigure the audio session category.
- AVAudioPlayer holds a strong reference to the file — release it before deleting the file.
- On Simulator, recording works but quality is poor (uses Mac mic). Test on device for real results.

UI BEST PRACTICES:
- Show a waveform or level meter during recording (use recorder.isMeteringEnabled = true, recorder.updateMeters(), recorder.averagePower(forChannel: 0)).
- Show recording duration with a timer.
- Provide pause/resume via recorder.pause() and recorder.record().
- For playback, show a scrubber with elapsed/remaining time.

ANTI-PATTERNS:
- Do NOT create AVAudioRecorder before setting the audio session category.
- Do NOT forget NSMicrophoneUsageDescription in Info.plist.
- Do NOT use .record category if you also need playback — use .playAndRecord.
- Do NOT assume the file URL persists across app launches without storing it.
- Do NOT play audio without preparing the player first (prepareToPlay).
antiPatterns: Creating AVAudioRecorder before configuring AVAudioSession category
Using .record category when playback is also needed (use .playAndRecord)
Not storing recording file URLs/metadata for persistence across app launches
Playing audio without calling prepareToPlay() first
